differential_diagnoses: Primary psychiatric disorder (bipolar mania with psychosis)
next_steps: Check serum thyroid stimulating hormone (TSH), free T4, and free T3 levels
Obtain anti-NMDA receptor antibody titers in serum and cerebrospinal fluid
Initiate empiric high-dose benzodiazepines with frequent monitoring for withdrawal stabilization
Monitor vital signs continuously for signs of autonomic instability
Consider 24-hour urine collection for porphobilinogen and delta-aminolevulinic acid
Consult endocrinology for evaluation of potential hyperthyroidism
